parameters: Aaah, and now I went and grumbled to a boy younger than me.
Rino
\se[16-nb]I've still got a long ways to go, don't I...
The park was once again covered in the still of night.
Did he come looking for me, by any chance?
A sweet boy, just like his father. I can leave Shino in his care without a worry.
Rino
\SE[12-nb]Compared to him, I'm...
Just what am I? Personally, I couldn't think of a single
thing that put me above anyone else.
Both my intelligence and talent are average. Maybe a bit better through my hard work.
But as I am right now, there's not a single thing that I excel in.
TRP_SkitMZ
expression
[表情/ポーズ]exp/表情変更
キャラ名 = Rino
ウェイト = def
表情名 = 21
所要時間 = def
The only strong points I have are... my appearance, and my body.
I looked down upon my womanly body, blessed more than most others.
Rino
\SE[12-nb]...Okay, I've decided.
If I keep being on the receiving end of such free kindness and help,
...I'm going to end up losing myself.
If I stop being the person, that both Shino and \n[2] look up to,
Will there even be a point to such an existence?
Will I be able to accept such an existence?
If I can remain myself, then no matter how deeply I have to sink...
--- I took 3 deep breaths, then picked up my phone and made a call.
Rino
\SE[1]Hello, I apologize for calling so late in the night. Uhm, this might
be a bit out of nowhere, but I'd like to make a suggestion...
Rino
\SE[11-nb]Yes... Yes... No, I'm serious. Yes, I understand...
TRP_SkitMZ
end
スキット終了
瞬時に非表示 = false

完了までウェイト = true
No
D
...Not feeling like just staying at home tonight, I was wandering around town
when I saw Rino nee-san at the local park.
Rino
\SM[jump]\SE[21]Huh?... \n[2], yaho~.
Rino

\se[24-nb]\SA[133]If you keep walking around late at night like this, you might just get pushed 
down by me, you know~?
Doing that sort of thing with her... this late at night, in the park?
It'd be a dream come true more than anything else.
Rino
\SE[1]...Really, what's got you out so late?
[I should ask you the same] ...is what I was about to say, when I noticed.
She was smiling, sure, but it was one that she was
forcing herself to maintain.
Rino
\SE[25-nb]...Ahahah, you noticed? Well, I'm out here in this place,
at this time, so of course you'd notice that at least something's up.
The Rino nee-san I know goes straight home from the office, and rambles
about random things to her sister while chugging her beloved booze.
Compared to that, this version of her was definitely a bit different.
MPP_ChoiceEX
choicePos
選択肢位置設定
行数 = 0
Rino nee-san....
...Did something happen?
...Did something happen?
Rino
\se[21-nb]Yeah.
...Sorry, I'll go back to being normal in no time, so could you keep me company for a bit?
The person I respect the most, the one that I always thought was
out of my reach, was relying upon me.
[If you're fine with me, I'm always available], I responded to her,
without putting up any sort of pretense.
Rino
\se[23-nb]Ahahahah--... Thanks.
Rino
Rino
\SE[5]...I ended up making a big mistake at work, you see.
Rino nee-san, the rising star of the department, always full
of gumption, and ever reliable.
-- or so I've heard her being called, and when I did have
the chance to see her working, she perfectly matched that image.
A wonderful adult, that both Shino and I look up to.
But, she's also human, so it's only natural for her to...
Rino
\SE[12-nb]It was a much bigger mistake, than I think you can imagine, \n[2].
[Everyone makes mistakes] ...or so I would have liked to say,
but I quickly swallowed up those words.
They're words that would be well received, from someone of equal footing.
But they are... definitely not words, that I can use to comfort her right now.
Suddenly, I remembered an event from the other day.
My old man and Rino nee-san were talking about something,
in front of our apartment building. ...Was that related to this?
Rino
\SE[2]And so, looking at just the result... it ended without incident, more or less.
That's good, I thought while sighing in relief.
But, if that's so when why's she here...
Rino
\se[24-nb]But it caused a whole lot of trouble, for a certain person.
Rino
\SE[10-nb]...Your father, \n[2].
Though I didn't want to hear his name, in this one instance, I could understand.
Although I didn't have all that good of an image of him, I know that
he's quite the brilliant and reliable manager at the company.
Rino
\SE[12-nb]Without caring that it might have affected his own evaluation,
he worked overtime to cover for my mistakes.
Rino
\se[16-nb]While I was panicking and worrying my head off about what to do,
he quietly took care of everything behind the scenes.
Rino
\SE[5]He didn't just help me get into the company,
he even cleaned up this mess for me... you know?
Rino
\SE[12-nb]I just don't know how I'm going to repay this debt.
Rino
\SE[5]I thought that I'd finally become a splendid adult for
you and Shino to look up to.
But in the end, I'm still just an overgrown child, nothing more.
Rino
\se[16-nb]What do I even do? If I keep needing someone to protect me like this...
Your onee-chan might just break.
I tried to think of words to comfort her, yet I managed to
voice none of them... and they all disappeared into the sky.
It's frustrating, but the only one who can clear up her worries is...
-- someone of equal, or greater footing...
Perhaps, only she herself might be able to do it.
Rino
\se[22-nb]Fufuh--... Thanks for hearing me out like this.
Rino
\SE[11-nb]When you see me next time, I'll be back to my usual sweet,
pretty, perfect and... a bit lewd onee-san self.
Rino
\se[23-nb]So, I'm sorry, go back home without me, okay?
I'll do as she said. There's nothing I can do for her as I am, after all.
TRP_SkitMZ
moveOut
[退出]moveOut/ムーブアウト
キャラ名 = Rino
ウェイト = def

スライド方向。 = auto
イージング = def
I waved goodbye to her, and started walking back home.
moon
I wondered if the day would come when I'll be an equal adult to her,
someone who'd be able to stand by her side and support her--
The moon up in the sky was lost between the clouds.
It felt as if it was a reflection of my own heart.
D

It felt as if it was a reflection of my own heart.
D
...Not feeling like just staying at home tonight, I was wandering around town
when I saw Rino nee-san at the local park.
Rino
\SM[jump]\SE[21]Huh?... \n[2], yaho~.
Rino

\se[24-nb]\SA[133]If you keep walking around late at night like this, you might just get pushed 
down by me, you know~?
Doing that sort of thing with her... this late at night, in the park?
It'd be a dream come true more than anything else.
Rino
\SE[1]...Really, what's got you out so late?
[I should ask you the same] ...is what I was about to say, when I noticed.
She was smiling, sure, but it was one that she was
forcing herself to maintain.
Rino
\SE[25-nb]...Ahahah, you noticed? Well, I'm out here in this place,
at this time, so of course you'd notice that at least something's up.
The Rino nee-san I know goes straight home from the office, and rambles
about random things to her sister while chugging her beloved booze.
Compared to that, this version of her was definitely a bit different.

Rino nee-san....
...Did something happen?
...Did something happen?
Rino
\se[21-nb]Yeah.
...Sorry, I'll go back to being normal in no time, so could you keep me company for a bit?
The person I respect the most, the one that I always thought was
out of my reach, was relying upon me.
[If you're fine with me, I'm always available], I responded to her,
without putting up any sort of pretense.
Rino
\se[23-nb]Ahahahah--... Thanks.
Rino
Rino
\SE[5]...I ended up making a big mistake at work, you see.
Rino nee-san, the rising star of the department, always full
of gumption, and ever reliable.
-- or so I've heard her being called, and when I did have
the chance to see her working, she perfectly matched that image.
A wonderful adult, that both Shino and I look up to.
But, she's also human, so it's only natural for her to...
Rino
\SE[12-nb]It was a much bigger mistake, than I think you can imagine, \n[2].
[Everyone makes mistakes] ...or so I would have liked to say,
but I quickly swallowed up those words.
They're words that would be well received, from someone of equal footing.
But they are... definitely not words, that I can use to comfort her right now.
Suddenly, I remembered an event from the other day.
My old man and Rino nee-san were talking about something,
in front of our apartment building. ...Was that related to this?
Rino
\SE[2]And so, looking at just the result... it ended without incident, more or less.
That's good, I thought while sighing in relief.
But, if that's so when why's she here...
Rino
\se[24-nb]But it caused a whole lot of trouble, for a certain person.
Rino
\SE[10-nb]...Your father, \n[2].
Though I didn't want to hear his name, in this one instance, I could understand.
Although I didn't have all that good of an image of him, I know that
he's quite the brilliant and reliable manager at the company.
Rino
\SE[12-nb]Without caring that it might have affected his own evaluation,
he worked overtime to cover for my mistakes.
Rino
\se[16-nb]While I was panicking and worrying my head off about what to do,
he quietly took care of everything behind the scenes.
Rino
\SE[5]He didn't just help me get into the company,
he even cleaned up this mess for me... you know?
Rino
\SE[12-nb]I just don't know how I'm going to repay this debt.
Rino
\SE[5]I thought that I'd finally become a splendid adult for
you and Shino to look up to.
But in the end, I'm still just an overgrown child, nothing more.
Rino
\se[16-nb]What do I even do? If I keep needing someone to protect me like this...
Your onee-chan might just break.
I tried to think of words to comfort her, yet I managed to
voice none of them... and they all disappeared into the sky.
It's frustrating, but the only one who can clear up her worries is...
-- someone of equal, or greater footing...
Perhaps, only she herself might be able to do it.
Rino
\se[22-nb]Fufuh--... Thanks for hearing me out like this.
Rino
\SE[11-nb]When you see me next time, I'll be back to my usual sweet,
pretty, perfect and... a bit lewd onee-san self.
Rino
\se[23-nb]So, I'm sorry, go back home without me, okay?
I'll do as she said. There's nothing I can do for her as I am, after all.
